summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Student and Parent Portal. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages and navigation verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test accounts (student@nassaq.com, parent@nassaq.com) already created with sample grades, attendance, and homework data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student and Parent Portal fully implemented and working. Features verified: 1) Student Login with student@nassaq.com/Student@123 2) Student Dashboard with welcome message, attendance rate, average score, recent grades, today's schedule 3) Student Schedule Page with weekly view by day 4) Student Grades Page with subject-wise breakdown and overall average 5) Student Attendance Page with monthly records and statistics 6) Student Homework Page with pending/completed/late assignments 7) Parent Login with parent@nassaq.com/Parent@123 8) Parent Dashboard with children list and quick stats 9) Child Details Page with grades, attendance, schedule access

student_login_nassaq.evidence: Login with student@nassaq.com / Student@123 successful, redirects to /student

student_login_test_button.evidence: Login via test account button (طالب) successful

student_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard shows welcome message, attendance 85%, average 80%, recent grades, attendance summary

student_schedule_page.evidence: Schedule page loads with day tabs (الأحد to الخميس), shows 'لا توجد حصص في هذا اليوم' when no classes

student_grades_page.evidence: Grades page shows overall average 74.3%, 20 recorded grades, subject breakdown with progress bars

student_attendance_page.evidence: Attendance page shows rate 77.8%, monthly records with status (present/late/absent), month navigation

student_homework_page.evidence: Homework page shows assignments with status tabs (pending/completed/late), due dates

parent_login_nassaq.evidence: Login with parent@nassaq.com / Parent@123 successful, redirects to /parent

parent_login_test_button.evidence: Login via test account button (ولي أمر) successful

parent_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard shows welcome message, children count, messages/notifications count

parent_children_list.evidence: Children displayed as cards with name, grade, attendance rate, average score

child_details_page.evidence: Child details show name, grade, school, recent grades, quick access buttons

navigation_student_portal.evidence: All navigation links work: الرئيسية, الجدول, الدرجات, الحضور, الواجبات

navigation_parent_portal.evidence: All navigation links work: الرئيسية, أبنائي, التقارير, الإشعارات, التواصل

api_student_dashboard.evidence: /api/student-portal/dashboard returns student info, grades, attendance, schedule

api_student_grades.evidence: /api/student-portal/grades returns subjects with grades and averages

api_parent_dashboard.evidence: /api/parent-portal/dashboard returns parent info and children list
